name: swap
description: Animated toggle between two icon/content states with rotate or flip transition

meta.name: Swap
meta.description: Animated toggle between two icon/content states with rotate or flip transition

props.name: on
props.description: Content shown in the active (on) state.

props.name: off
props.description: Content shown in the inactive (off) state.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with the new checked state when the swap is toggled.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label used when no visible label is present.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

examples.title: Theme toggle (rotate)
examples.description: Sun/moon icon that rotates between two states

examples.title: Flip mode
examples.description: Heart icon that flips to filled on activation

whenToUse: Theme toggles where an icon animates between two states (sun/moon)
Favorite or bookmark toggles that flip between outlined and filled icons
Any scenario where exactly two icons swap places with a transition
whenNotToUse: Form toggles with a visible label — use Toggle
Checkbox-style inputs that are part of a submitted form — use Checkbox
When a text label must always be visible alongside the control

antiPatterns.why: Swap is designed for icon transitions; for labeled on/off controls use Toggle

related.name: Toggle
related.reason: Use when a visible text label is required alongside the switch control

related.name: Checkbox
related.reason: Use for form selections that are submitted rather than applied immediately

intent.a11yRationale: Renders a <button role="switch"> with aria-checked reflecting state. Both on/off slots are aria-hidden so screen readers announce the button state, not the icon content.

flexibility.note: on/off slots accept any ReactNode — icons, text, images
rotate (default) or flip — choose based on the visual metaphor of the icons
